_comment: HealthBridge Clinic Journey Template - Airtable Base Schema
_description: Use this as a reference to manually recreate the Airtable base. Airtable does not support direct JSON import but this documents the full schema.

tables.name: Patients
tables.description: One record per patient enrolled in a care journey

fields.name: phone_number
fields.description: WhatsApp/SMS number with country code e.g. +254712345678

fields.name: diagnosis
fields.description: Short clinical note e.g. Hypertension follow-up

fields.name: attending_nurse
fields.description: Name of the nurse managing the journey

fields.name: journey_status
fields.description: Current stage in the patient journey - drives Make.com routing logic

fields.name: follow_up_count
fields.description: Auto-incremented by Make each time a follow-up is sent

fields.name: last_contacted
fields.description: Date of last outbound message - updated by Make

fields.name: escalation_flag
fields.description: True if patient needs urgent nurse review

fields.name: consent_given
fields.description: True if patient consented to automated messages

tables.name: Journey Log
tables.description: Append-only log of all patient journey events

fields.name: message_content
fields.description: Full text of the message sent

fields.name: triggered_by
fields.description: e.g. Make scenario or Nurse manual
